summary: Added a read-only doctor envelope to dcg-prose-trigger-strip-gate so the DCG prose safety gate can report prerequisite and pattern-catalog health without requiring an input body.

proof.summary: 10/0 focused assertions: doctor and --doctor emit dcg-prose-trigger-strip-gate.doctor.v1 with mutates=false, info/help/examples advertise doctor, safe prose still passes, dangerous prose still returns rc=1 with matches, and apply remains reserved/refused.
Touched shell surfaces are ShellCheck clean.
Live read-only doctor reports schema dcg-prose-trigger-strip-gate.doctor.v1, status pass, pattern_count=8, memory_rule_present, jq_available, pattern_catalog_nonempty, and mutates=false.
Inventory regenerated; dcg-prose-trigger-strip-gate.sh now reports doctor_subcommand_status=basic instead of absent.

parent_state.reason: The broader doctor-mode wave remains open; this closes one scoped DCG safety-gate surface only.
